# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release of Symaira Fetch is actively supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v0.1.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < v0.1  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of Symaira Fetch seriously. If you discover a vulnerability, please report it privately via GitHub's Private Vulnerability Reporting feature in this repository.

Alternatively, you can email security reports to security@symaira.com. Please do not open a public issue for security-sensitive bugs.
